parameters.formDescription: Submit a draft prompt for Author–Critic–Moderator deliberation.

nodes.name: Trigger: Form
nodes.notes: Entry point. draft_prompt is required; extra_context is optional. responseMode=lastNode returns Code: Final Output as the form response.

nodes.name: n8n Table: Load Env Vars
nodes.notes: Loads all rows from the shared EnvironmentVariables table. Replace REPLACE_WITH_ENV_TABLE_ID with the actual table UUID post-import.

nodes.name: Code: Build Config
nodes.notes: Builds flat Name→Value map from EnvironmentVariables rows. Validates all 15 required keys. Access values as: $('Code: Build Config').first().json.KeyName

nodes.name: Code: Build Refiner Payload
nodes.notes: Assembles Gemini request for prompt_moderator_refiner. Reads trigger data directly from Trigger: Form; config from Build Config.

nodes.name: HTTP: Moderate Refine
nodes.notes: Calls Gemini to convert draft_prompt into a RACE-structured refined_prompt and scoring rubric. temperature=0.2 enforced in payload.

nodes.name: Code: Parse Refined Prompt
nodes.notes: Extracts refined_prompt and rubric from Gemini. Initialises pipeline state: retry_count=0, latest_author_output=null, iterations=[].

nodes.name: Code: Build Author v1 Payload
nodes.notes: Assembles Anthropic request for the initial Author draft. max_tokens = Author_Thinking_Budget + 4096 per spec; extended thinking enabled.

nodes.name: HTTP: Author v1
nodes.notes: Calls Claude Opus (Author_Model) with extended thinking for the initial draft. x-api-key header required; anthropic-version required.

nodes.name: Code: Parse Author v1
nodes.notes: Extracts concatenated text blocks into latest_author_output (working) and initial_author_output (immutable v1 snapshot). Thinking blocks stored as latest_author_thinking and initial_author_thinking; neither flows into downstream model calls.

nodes.name: Merge: Critic Inputs
nodes.notes: Loop entry point. Input 0: Code: Parse Author v1 (first pass). Input 1: Code: Increment Retry (subsequent passes). N8N loop detection fires this node when either input is active.

nodes.name: Code: Build Critic Payload
nodes.notes: Assembles OpenAI request for Critic_Model. latest_author_thinking is carried in state but never inserted into the user message, keeping thinking blocks out of downstream calls.

nodes.name: HTTP: Critic
nodes.notes: Calls Critic_Model (ChatGPT) with reasoning_effort and json_object response_format. Returns structured critique JSON.

nodes.name: Code: Parse Critic Response
nodes.notes: Parses Critic JSON (strengths, weaknesses, suggested_revisions). Full state carried forward via Build Critic Payload reference.

nodes.name: Code: Build Author Revision Payload
nodes.notes: Assembles Anthropic revision request. User message includes refined_prompt, previous author output, critic JSON, and the explicit revision instruction from the spec.

nodes.name: HTTP: Author Revision
nodes.notes: Calls Claude Opus (Author_Model) with extended thinking to produce the revised draft addressing the Critic's suggested_revisions.

nodes.name: Code: Parse Author Revision
nodes.notes: Updates latest_author_output and latest_author_thinking with the revised draft. initial_author_output and initial_author_thinking are immutable v1 snapshots carried through unchanged.

nodes.name: Code: Build Validator Payload
nodes.notes: Assembles Gemini request for prompt_moderator_validator. Passes refined_prompt, rubric, and latest_author_output for per-criterion scoring.

nodes.name: HTTP: Validate
nodes.notes: Calls Gemini (Moderator_Model) to score the revised author output against the rubric. Returns per_criterion scores, overall_score, verdict, and recommendation.

nodes.name: Code: Parse Validator Response
nodes.notes: Parses validator JSON and appends a complete iteration entry (author_output, author_thinking, critic_json, validator_json) to iterations[]. overall_score drives the downstream IF gate.

nodes.name: IF: Pass Threshold Met
nodes.notes: True: overall_score >= Pass_Threshold → proceed to Build Trace with PASS. False: check retry eligibility.

nodes.name: IF: Retry Eligible
nodes.notes: True: retry_count < Max_Critique_Passes - 1 → increment and loop back to Critic. False: max passes reached, proceed to Build Trace with FAIL verdict.

nodes.name: Code: Increment Retry
nodes.notes: Increments retry_count by 1. Carries immutable initial_author_output/thinking and working latest_author_thinking forward. Output connects to Merge: Critic Inputs input 1.

nodes.name: Code: Build Trace
nodes.notes: Assembles full trace JSON per spec including initial_author_output and initial_author_thinking v1 snapshots. Filename: deliberation_<ISO>.json.

nodes.name: Drive: Upload Trace
nodes.notes: Uploads the deliberation trace JSON to LogFolderId. onError=stopWorkflow: logging failure is a hard stop, not a soft error.

nodes.name: Code: Final Output
nodes.notes: Shapes the form response: status (validator verdict string), final_output, validator_summary, retry_count. This is the last node; formTrigger returns its $json as the response body.
